name: Back-Office
description: Generic moderation / approval queue and support-ticket desk. Any owning module can route an entity through human review via the entity-agnostic approval queue (with a tamper-evident per-tenant decision hash chain and an in-memory decision-handler hook), and customers can open support tickets with per-tenant monotonic ticket numbers, agent assignment, internal notes, first-response + resolution SLA tracking. Every decision is recorded in the append-only audit log; submitters/requesters are notified in-app and webhooks fire on each lifecycle event.
